name: Feature request

**The problem**
What are you trying to do that Vellum makes hard today?

**What you have in mind**

**Does it fit the scope?**
Vellum is a single-user, local-first design-review tool (see the Scope section
of the README). Ideas that keep it there are the easiest to take on; hosted,
multi-user, or non-design-review features are likely out of scope.
